info.title: Custom voice API
info.description: Custom voice API to create and deploy your voice.

parameters.name: endpoint

https://eastus.api.cognitive.microsoft.com).

delete.description:
Deletes the project identified by the given ID. All data (like consent,
training set) in this project will be deleted automatically.

parameters.name: forceDelete
parameters.description:
Set this to true if you want to delete a project with model and endpoint.
Otherwise, the delete operation will fail.

defaultScopes.description: Oauth2 scopes of every flow. Overridden by scope definitions in specific flows

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

AzureBlobContentSource.description:
Azure Blob Storage content. With the examples below, it represents files
https://contoso.blob.core.windows.net/voicecontainer/jessica/*.wav

containerUrl.description:
Azure Blob Storage container URL with
[SAS](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage/common/storage-sas-overview).
Need both read and list permissions.

releaseDateTime.description:
The stamp when the base model was released. The timestamp is encoded as ISO
8601 date and time format ("YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ", see
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Combined_date_and_time_representations).

expirationDateTime.description:
The timestamp when TTS service will stop serving this base model. The timestamp
is encoded as ISO 8601 date and time format ("YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ", see
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Combined_date_and_time_representations).

voiceTalentName.description: Voice talent name. Must match the voice talent name in the consent audio file.

companyName.description: Company name. Must match the company name in the consent audio file.

audioUrl.description:
The public accessible URL of the consent audio file. It's recommended to be an
Azure blob URL with
[SAS](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage/common/storage-sas-overview).
This property is only available in request.

locale.description:
The locale of this consent. Locale code follows BCP-47. You can find the text
to speech locale list here
https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/speech-service/language-support?tabs=tts.

createdDateTime.description:
The timestamp when the object was created. The timestamp is encoded as ISO 8601
date and time format ("YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ", see
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Combined_date_and_time_representations)

lastActionDateTime.description:
The timestamp when the current status was entered. The timestamp is encoded as
ISO 8601 date and time format ("YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ", see
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Combined_date_and_time_representations).

values.name: AudioAndScriptNotMatch
values.description:
The consent audio mismatch with verbal statement. Please check
[verbal-statement](https://github.com/Azure-Samples/Cognitive-Speech-TTS/blob/master/CustomVoice/script/verbal-statement-all-locales.txt).

processAs.description:
Dataset processing method. If not specified, the default processing method will
be used.

audios.description:
Azure Blob Storage content. With the examples below, it represents files
https://contoso.blob.core.windows.net/voicecontainer/jessica/*.wav

scripts.description:
Azure Blob Storage content. With the examples below, it represents files
https://contoso.blob.core.windows.net/voicecontainer/jessica/*.wav

DatasetProcessAs.description:
Dataset processing method. If not specified, the default processing method will
be used.

values.name: Segmented
values.description: The default processing mode that works with all supported languages.

values.name: Contextual
values.description:
An enhanced mode that retains the audio as a whole to keep the contextual
information for more natural intonations.

values.name: InaccessibleCustomerStorage
values.description:
The customer uses Bring Your Own Storage in Speech Account. But the storage is
not accessible now. Please check
[doc](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/speech-service/bring-your-own-storage-speech-resource?tabs=portal#configure-byos-associated-storage-account).

values.name: SpeakerVerificationFailed
values.description: The consent and training audio are not from the same speaker.

values.name: DataNotReady
values.description: Training data is not ready for model training.

values.name: DataNotEnough
values.description: Training data is not enough for model training.

PresetStyleItem.description:
Preset styles supported by the recipe. The voice model can support these styles
without any style training set.

male.description: Preset styles supported on male voice model.

female.description: Preset styles supported on female voice model.

Project.description:
Project object. Consents, training sets, models, and endpoints are organized in
a project.

locale.description:
The locale of this project. Locale code follows BCP-47. You can find the text
to speech locale list here
https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/speech-service/language-support?tabs=tts.

createdDateTime.description:
The timestamp when the object was created. The timestamp is encoded as ISO 8601
date and time format ("YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ", see
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Combined_date_and_time_representations).

Recipe.description: Recipe for model building. Different recipes have different capability.

minUtteranceCount.description: Minimum utterance count required to train a voice model with this recipe.

minStyleUtteranceCount.description: Minimum utterance count required to train each customized style.

maxCustomStyleNum.description: Maximum customized style number supported in one voice model.

datasetLocales.description:
The locale of the training dataset. Locale code follows BCP-47. You can find
the text to speech locale list here
https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/speech-service/language-support?tabs=tts.

modelLocales.description:
The locale that a voice model can speak with this recipe. Locale code follows
BCP-47. You can find the text to speech locale list here
https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/speech-service/language-support?tabs=tts.

presetStyles.description:
Preset styles supported by this recipe per locale. You can get these styles
without any style training set.

minDurationInSeconds.description:
Minimum audio duration in seconds required to train a voice model with this
recipe.

locale.description:
The locale of the training dataset. Locale code follows BCP-47. You can find
the text to speech locale list here
https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/speech-service/language-support?tabs=tts.

createdDateTime.description:
The timestamp when the object was created. The timestamp is encoded as ISO 8601
date and time format ("YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ", see
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Combined_date_and_time_representations).

lastActionDateTime.description:
The timestamp when the current status was entered. The timestamp is encoded as
ISO 8601 date and time format ("YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ", see
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Combined_date_and_time_representations).

utteranceCount.description: Utterance count in this training set

durationInSeconds.description: Total duration of audio in seconds in this training set

isContextual.description: Indicates whether the training set is composed of contextual data

Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.name: api-version
Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.description: The API version to use for this operation.

CustomListQueryParameters.filter.name: filter
CustomListQueryParameters.filter.description:
Filter condition.
- **Supported properties:** projectId, createdDateTime, locale, kind
- **Operators:**
- eq, ne are supported for all properties.
- gt, ge, lt, le are supported for createdDateTime.
- **Example:**
- ```filter=projectId eq 'Jessica'``` (filter by project ID)
- ```filter=kind eq 'ProfessionalVoice'``` (filter project by kind)
- ```filter=locale eq 'en-US'``` (filter training set and model by locale)
- ```filter=createdDateTime gt 2022-12-30T23:59:59.99Z``` (filter resource
created time after 2023-11-01)

CustomListQueryParameters.maxpagesize.name: maxpagesize
CustomListQueryParameters.maxpagesize.description: The maximum number of items to include in a single response.

CustomListQueryParameters.skip.name: skip
CustomListQueryParameters.skip.description: The number of result items to skip.

OperationIdHeader.name: Operation-Id
OperationIdHeader.description:
ID of the status monitor for the operation. If the Operation-Id header matches
an existing operation and the request is not identical to the prior request, it
will fail with a 400 Bad Request.
